title: Cool End
description: This mod adds new biomes, structures, mobs and resources to the End and Overworld, expanding exploration and improving gameplay and visuals.
body: This Minecraft mod expands and improves both the End and the Overworld, adding a variety of new features and content. In the End, new floating islands, structures such as temples and cities, unique biomes with special vegetation and creatures, as well as rare materials are introduced. Additionally, new challenges and lore are included that enrich the exploration experience. In the Overworld, the mod adds additional biomes, improved graphics, more diverse fauna and resources, as well as smoother and more natural terrain generation. These improvements make both dimensions more dynamic, visually appealing, and with more content to explore and discover.
